coreJobStatement: Design, manufacture, and deliver precision linear motion guide systems that enable accurate, repeatable, load-capable linear travel in industrial machinery and automation equipment
hierarchy: Process VN (L7 through L4) — precision linear motion guide manufacturing chain
marketSize: ~$2.7-3.0B (linear guide rails, 2024); ~$12B (full linear motion system); CAGR ~4.3% (guide rails, 2023-2030)

l6Systems.name: Rail Material Production
l6Systems.jobFamily: Transform steel into a hardened, near-net-shape guide rail profile - the structural and tribological core of the linear guide

l6Systems.name: Rail Precision Grinding & Finishing
l6Systems.jobFamily: Grind raceways and reference surfaces to final accuracy grade; straighten; cut to length

l6Systems.name: Carriage Block Machining
l6Systems.jobFamily: Machine carriage body: ball/roller return channels, mounting holes, seal seats, and end-cap interfaces

l6Systems.name: Rolling Element & Retainer Supply
l6Systems.jobFamily: Procure or manufacture precision balls, rollers, and retainer cages to specification

l6Systems.name: Sub-Assembly & Preloading
l6Systems.jobFamily: Load rolling elements, set preload class, fit end seals and wipers, apply initial lubrication

l6Systems.name: Accuracy Testing & Grading
l6Systems.jobFamily: Verify dimensional accuracy grade, running resistance, static/dynamic load rating, straightness

l6Systems.name: Quality Assurance (H)
l6Systems.jobFamily: ISO 9001, JIS B 1192, EN ISO 286 dimensional verification, SPC monitoring across all production steps

l6Systems.name: Maintenance & Tooling Management (H)
l6Systems.jobFamily: Maintain production equipment, tooling, fixtures and plant services across all core steps

l6Systems.name: Inbound Logistics & Materials Management (H)
l6Systems.jobFamily: Manage incoming materials, WIP, finished goods, and just-in-time delivery

l6Systems.name: Production Planning & MES/ERP (H)
l6Systems.jobFamily: Production scheduling, MES/ERP coordination, and process control across all steps

vnUnits.name: Steel Rail Profile Stock
vnUnits.functionalJob: Hardened steel profile blank - the structural and tribological base material of the guide rail, delivered in near-net-shape cross-section before final precision grinding. ZOLLERN PRIMARY POSITION. Alternatives: Custom cold-drawn induction-hardened precision profile (~25%), Bearing steel bar stock (~60%), Hot-rolled T-section/flat profile (~15%).
vnUnits.description: ZOLLERN enters here with custom cold-drawn, induction-hardened precision profiles at IT8 tolerance (+-0.02 mm), Ra <= 1.6 um

vnUnits.name: Rail Material Inspection & Certification
vnUnits.functionalJob: Incoming dimensional verification and material traceability documentation for guide rail steel. EN 10204 Type 3.1 material test report + CMM incoming check (~70%).

vnUnits.name: Induction Hardening Line
vnUnits.functionalJob: Surface hardening of guide rail profile to 58-64 HRC to depth 0.5-5 mm while retaining ductile core. In-line induction hardening (~60%), batch furnace (~30%), outsourced (~10%).

vnUnits.name: CNC Profile Grinder
vnUnits.functionalJob: CNC surface/profile grinding machine for achieving final raceway geometry, Ra <= 0.2 um, and accuracy grade SP/UP. Studer, Junker, Magerle, NUM.

vnUnits.name: Precision Ball Stock
vnUnits.functionalJob: Precision rolling balls (chrome steel, ceramic, or stainless) graded G10-G25 per ISO 3290 for load transfer in rail carriage.

vnUnits.name: Assembly Station & Preload Setting Equipment
vnUnits.functionalJob: Assembly workstation or line for loading rolling elements, setting preload class, fitting seals, and lubricating the guide unit.

vnUnits.name: Linear Accuracy Measurement System
vnUnits.functionalJob: Laser interferometer or CMM system for verifying JIS/ISO accuracy grade, positioning accuracy, and straightness of finished guide.

zollernPosition: ZOLLERN holds PRIMARY position at L5 Steel Rail Profile Stock under L6a Rail Material Production. Cold-drawn, induction-hardened precision profiles at IT8 tolerance. Adjacent positions: Rail Material Inspection & Certification (zero adaptation), Induction Hardening toll service (zero CapEx).
strategicPosition: ZOLLERN wins where physics and process control matter (dimensional consistency, hardness uniformity, traceability). Loses where the custom die model creates friction (tooling cost, lead time, single-source risk).

sources.label: Valuates Reports - Linear Guide Rail Market 2024
THK, HIWIN, Bosch Rexroth product catalogs
